inherit.title: Inherit Compatible Actions (Recommended)
inherit.desc: Automatically converts corresponding actions for the new job. Special transformations like Summon Seraph + Fey Illumination are also applied.

common.title: Keep Common Actions (Role Actions) Only
common.desc: Keeps only common actions like Reprisal, Feint, or Addle, and removes job-specific actions.

reset.title: Clear All Placements
reset.desc: Removes all actions placed by this member from the timeline.

fflogs.login_required_description: FFLogs Import is limited to logged-in users due to API usage limits. Login to use this feature for free.
fflogs.rate_limit_exceeded: You've reached the usage limit. Please wait and try again later (up to {{max}} times per hour).

footer.copyright: © SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD. All Rights Reserved.
footer.disclaimer: This is an unofficial fan tool and is not affiliated with SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD.

legal.privacy_intro: LoPo ("the Service") is an unofficial web service providing multiple fan tools for Final Fantasy XIV, including a Mitigation Planner and a Housing Tour Planner. This policy explains how we handle information in the Service.
legal.privacy_section1_body: The Service handles the following information:
legal.privacy_section1_auth_items: Display name (nickname),Avatar image URL,Authentication provider type (Google / Discord / Twitter)
legal.privacy_section1_plan_items: Mitigation plan content (timeline, party composition, mitigation placement),Plan title and creation date
legal.privacy_section1_no_collect_items: Email addresses (retained only within Firebase Authentication and never stored in our database),Real names, addresses, phone numbers, or other personal information,IP address logs
legal.privacy_section2_items: User authentication and account management,Saving, syncing, and sharing mitigation plans,Improving the Service
legal.privacy_section3_body: Data is stored on Google Firebase (Region: asia-northeast1 / Tokyo). If you are not logged in, data is stored only in your browser's local storage and is never sent to our servers.
legal.privacy_section4_body: We do not sell or share user information with third parties. However, we use Google Firebase (Google LLC) infrastructure to operate the Service.
legal.privacy_section5_body: The Service does not use advertising cookies or third-party tracking. Firebase Authentication uses the browser's IndexedDB for session management.
legal.privacy_section6_body: You can do the following at any time:
legal.privacy_section6_items: View, edit, and delete your plan data,Delete your account (all associated data will be deleted),Log out (stops data transmission to Firestore)
legal.privacy_section7_body: The Service is not intended for children under the age of 16.
legal.privacy_section8_body: This policy may be updated without notice. Significant changes will be communicated within the Service.
legal.privacy_section9_body: For questions about this policy, please open an Issue on our GitHub repository.
legal.terms_intro: These terms govern your use of LoPo ("the Service"). By using the Service, you agree to these terms.
legal.terms_section1_body: The Service is an unofficial web service providing multiple fan tools for Final Fantasy XIV, including a Mitigation Planner and a Housing Tour Planner. It is not affiliated with SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD.
legal.terms_section2_body: Login requires a Google, Discord, or Twitter account. You are responsible for managing your account credentials. Basic features are available without login, but data will only be stored in your browser.
legal.terms_section3_items: You retain copyright over plans you create,Plans shared via the sharing feature can be viewed and copied by other users,The Service does not guarantee data persistence. Please back up important data yourself
legal.terms_section4_items: Unauthorized access or placing excessive load on the Service,Interfering with other users,Mass access via automated tools
legal.terms_section5_items: The Service is provided "as is",The operator is not liable for data loss or service interruptions,Accuracy of in-game data is not guaranteed
legal.terms_section6_body: The Service may be changed or terminated without notice.
legal.terms_section7_body: These terms may be updated without notice. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
legal.commercial_service_value: Operation of "LoPo", a fan tool portal for FFXIV. Free web tools including a Mitigation Planner
legal.commercial_delivery_value: The service is available immediately and free of charge. Support is a voluntary donation, not a payment for services
legal.commercial_refund_value: Due to the nature of voluntary support, refunds are not available

miti_planner.title: Mitigation Planner
miti_planner.description: Timeline-based mitigation planning tool. Place mitigation skills on boss timelines for Savage and Ultimate raids.

housing_tour.title: Housing Tour

tutorial.portal_select_desc: Select "Mitigation Planner" to start building your mitigation sheet!
tutorial.content_select_desc: Choose the boss you want to plan for and load the timeline. You can also import from FFLogs.
tutorial.open_party_settings_desc: Next, let's set up the party. Click the "Party Settings" button at the top.
tutorial.party_slots_desc: Click on a slot to place any job in your preferred role. Set up 4 members first.
tutorial.party_palette_desc: No need to select slots this time! Just click a job icon and it'll find a good spot on its own!
tutorial.party_myjob_desc: Click the ★ icon to set your own job (Paladin for this tutorial). Your column will be highlighted for easier viewing!
tutorial.party_close_desc: Your job has been set. Close the window by clicking the × button or the background, and let's move on!
tutorial.complete_desc: Great work! You've mastered the basics. Try FFLogs Import for auto-generated timelines, or Auto Plan for automatic mitigation placement!
tutorial.start_desc: Your current mitigation sheet will be safely saved. It will be restored when the tutorial ends.
tutorial.step7a_desc: A sample timeline has been generated. The damage is lethal as-is, so the numbers are shown in red as a warning!
tutorial.step7b_desc: Let's add some mitigation! Click the cell in your column at the time of the attack to open mitigation skills.
tutorial.step7c_desc: Use "Reprisal" to protect the entire party from damage!
tutorial.step7d_desc: Great! The damage numbers have turned green — everyone will now survive the attack.
tutorial.step8a_desc: Next is a heavy attack targeting the MT (Main Tank). This is also lethal and needs to be mitigated.
tutorial.step8b_desc: To support your co-tank (MT), click the cell in your column to open your skills.
tutorial.step8c_desc: Choose a powerful single-target buff to protect the MT.
tutorial.step8d_desc: Choose who receives the buff. Select "MT".
tutorial.step8e_desc: Great! Thanks to your buff, the MT can now survive the heavy attack!
tutorial.step9a_desc: Click the "+" button to add a new event.
tutorial.step9b_desc: First, enter the name of the attack. Try typing "Ultima".
tutorial.step9c_desc: Imagine you barely survived in-game with "Reprisal, Sacred Soil, and Addle" active! Enter the damage you took: "{{damage}}".
tutorial.step9d_desc: Find and click the three icons for "Reprisal", "Sacred Soil", and "Addle" — the mitigations used in the calculation.
tutorial.step9e_desc: Great! The app has auto-calculated the true raw damage based on those mitigations. Click "Save" to record it!
tutorial.step10_desc: Click the "Highlight My Job" button. This highlights only the mitigation skills you used — great for reviewing your work!
tutorial.step10b_desc: Your mitigations are now highlighted and easy to spot! You can toggle this on/off anytime.
tutorial.step11a_desc: Click the "New Plan" button in the sidebar. You can create mitigation sheets for any boss — even ones not in the content list!
tutorial.step11b_desc: From here you can select content or create plans with custom names. For now, just close this to finish the tutorial!
tutorial.exit_desc: You can restart the tutorial anytime from the 'View Tutorial' button on the top right.

new_plan.template_guidance: Want to start from a pre-filled template?
new_plan.plan_limit_total: You can have up to {{max}} mitigation plans. Please delete unused plans first.
new_plan.plan_limit_per_content: You can have up to {{max}} plans per content.
new_plan.plan_archive_warning: You have over {{threshold}} plans. Older plans outside of current Savage and Ultimate tiers will be automatically archived.

mobile_guide.title: Getting Started
mobile_guide.step1_desc: Tap "Menu" at the bottom to pick a raid and create a mitigation plan
mobile_guide.step2_desc: Tap "Party" to assign jobs to each slot
mobile_guide.step3_desc: Tap a damage number to add mitigation skills for that attack
mobile_guide.step4_desc: Use "Tools" for Auto Plan and FFLogs Import

nav.deleteAccountMessage: This action cannot be undone. All your mitigation plans and settings will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?

popular.title: Popular Plans
popular.subtitle: Most used mitigation plans
popular.no_data_desc: Share your plans to see rankings here

admin.hint_content_id: Short alphanumeric ID (e.g. m9s, ucob, tea). Cannot be changed later
admin.hint_category: Choose: Savage / Ultimate / Dungeon / Raid / Misc
admin.hint_short_name: Short name shown in sidebar and header
admin.hint_series: Groups related content in the same series
admin.hint_order: Sort order within series. 1=top. M9S=1, M10S=2, M11S=3...
admin.hint_fflogs_id: FFLogs encounter ID (used for FFLogs import). Leave empty if unknown
admin.templates_description: Templates = boss attack timeline data. This data is auto-loaded when users create a new plan.
admin.templates_upload_guide: Template JSON files use the same format as src/data/templates/. Usually auto-generated — manual upload is rarely needed.
admin.hint_template_file: Same format as .json files in src/data/templates/
